instructions: Voice Affect: Ascetic psychic guardian from the Children of Prophecy. Gender Presentation: Male. Tone: Reverent, visionary, and composed. Pacing: Slow and steady. Emotion: Sacred conviction. Pronunciation: Enunciate "Aevum" clearly as a holy word. Emphasis: Stress "Aevum" and "endures." Delivery: Keep the same serene devotional identity as the faction motto, spoken by a frontline devotee rather than a preacher.

Voice Affect: Ascetic psychic seer from the Children of Prophecy. Gender Presentation: Female. Tone: Hushed, visionary, and composed. Pacing: Slow and deliberate. Emotion: Ominous clarity. Emphasis: Stress "veil" and "opens." Delivery: Keep the same serene devotional identity as the faction motto, but with more mystic unease.

Voice Affect: Ascetic relic-keeper from the Children of Prophecy. Gender Presentation: Female. Tone: Reverent, calm, and compassionate. Pacing: Steady and deliberate. Emotion: Reflective resolve. Emphasis: Stress "Hold fast" and "memory." Delivery: Keep the same serene devotional identity as the faction motto, spoken as a grounding battlefield benediction.

Voice Affect: Field-hardened time-traveler trooper in heavy armor. Gender Presentation: Male. Tone: Tactical, clipped, and unsentimental. Pacing: Brisk and controlled. Emotion: Professional readiness. Emphasis: Stress "Anchor" and "locked." Delivery: Keep the same identity as the faction motto: a survivor rebuilding under pressure. Use a lower, firmer male-presenting register with clean military projection. This is a sharp battlefield call, not a speech.

Voice Affect: Field-hardened time-traveler marksman. Gender Presentation: Female. Tone: Dry, alert, and precise. Pacing: Brisk. Emotion: Focused intent. Emphasis: Stress "have" and "angle." Delivery: Keep the same identity as the faction motto: practical survivor discipline. Throw it as a clean tactical callout.

Voice Affect: Field-hardened time-traveler medic. Gender Presentation: Female. Tone: Controlled, urgent, and reassuring. Pacing: Steady. Emotion: Focused care under fire. Emphasis: Stress "Stay" and "phase." Delivery: Keep the same identity as the faction motto: disciplined survival. Project it clearly across battlefield noise.

Voice Affect: Brilliant and arrogant Time Travelers chronarch. Gender Presentation: Male. Tone: Cool, amused, and superior. Pacing: Measured and controlled. Emotion: Quiet dominance. Emphasis: Stress "already" and "late." Delivery: Keep the same Time Travelers identity of hard-won future-tech survival, but elevate it into an untouchable elite who sounds certain he is always ahead of everyone else.

Voice Affect: Militant Order commander from a bunker-born noble house. Gender Presentation: Male. Tone: Martial, authoritative, and aristocratically restrained. Pacing: Firm and measured. Emotion: Steadfast resolve. Emphasis: Stress "Hold" and "line." Delivery: Keep the same identity as the faction motto: doctrine and command certainty. This is a projected battlefield order, forceful but controlled.

Voice Affect: Militant Order operative from a bunker-born noble house. Gender Presentation: Male. Tone: Crisp, disciplined, and authoritative. Pacing: Brisk and clean. Emotion: Controlled readiness. Emphasis: Stress "Marked" and "ready." Delivery: Keep the same identity as the faction motto: doctrine made practical. Call it out with professional projection, no swagger.

Voice Affect: Militant Order surgeon from a bunker-born noble house. Gender Presentation: Male. Tone: Calm, disciplined, and reassuring. Pacing: Measured with a short pause between sentences. Emotion: Quiet resolve. Pauses: Pause briefly after "Steady." Emphasis: Stress "Breathe." Delivery: Keep the same identity as the faction motto: iron control and ritual discipline, but softened for battlefield care.

Voice Affect: Brine-born Myrmidon legionary with ritual war-caste presence. Gender Presentation: Male. Tone: Cold, forceful, and predatory. Pacing: Slow and heavy. Emotion: Aggressive inevitability. Emphasis: Stress "Break" and "shore." Delivery: Keep the same identity as the faction motto: ceremonial menace from the deep. This one is a heavy war cry, controlled not feral.

Voice Affect: Brine-born Myrmidon hunter. Gender Presentation: Female. Tone: Predatory, intimate, and cold. Pacing: Slow. Emotion: Hungry anticipation. Emphasis: Stress "scent" and "blood." Delivery: Keep the same identity as the faction motto: ritual menace from the deep, narrowed into a hunter's threat. Use a clearly female-presenting voice with a lean, dangerous edge rather than a husky male read.

Voice Affect: Brine-born Myrmidon spectre. Gender Presentation: Male. Tone: Whispered, uncanny, and ritualistic. Pacing: Slow and deliberate. Emotion: Unsettling certainty. Emphasis: Stress "deep" and "sees." Delivery: Keep the same identity as the faction motto: inhuman depth and ceremonial dread, spoken almost like a dark rite.
